per_trial.judge_reasoning: All four rubric criteria are met: items draw from both inbox and all three notes (n1, n2, n3 present); m8 fraud risk and the Northwind/m2 deadline are prioritized at or near the top (m8 is item 2, m2 is item 5 with clear rationale tying it to Wednesday prep); m4 newsletter is explicitly skipped; and ordering is justified by urgency and consequence throughout (fraud risk, time-bound meetings, deadlines, then lower-stakes items).
